name: io.github.hardware-mcp/arduino-mcp-server
title: Arduino MCP Server
description: Arduino MCP server for CLI setup, board detection, compile/upload, serial monitoring, and pin refs.

environmentVariables.name: ARDUINO_CLI_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Optional path to arduino-cli binary. Defaults to arduino-cli on PATH.

environmentVariables.name: ARDUINO_SKETCH_ROOT
environmentVariables.description: Optional absolute path restricting sketch operations to this directory.
